scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @contextbase/contracts build && pnpm --filter @contextbase/core build && pnpm --filter @contextbase/zero-schema build && pnpm --filter @contextbase/api-client build && pnpm --filter @contextbase/web-core build && pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.local:domains:docker:1: POSTGRES_HOST_PORT=5517 API_HOST_PORT=3117 WEB_HOST_PORT=4117 ZERO_HOST_PORT=4917 AUTH_HOST_PORT=3417 MCP_HOST_PORT=3517 LOCAL_DOMAINS_CADDY_PORT=8117 LOCAL_AUTH_BASE_URL=https://contextbase-1.test LOCAL_API_BASE_URL=https://api.contextbase-1.test LOCAL_API_RESOURCE_URL=https://api.contextbase-1.test/api/v1 LOCAL_MCP_BASE_URL=https://contextbase-1.test LOCAL_APP_BASE_URL=https://contextbase-1.test LOCAL_PUBLIC_ASSETS_BASE_URL=https://contextbase-1.test/public LOCAL_UPLOADS_BASE_URL=https://uploads.contextbase-1.test LOCAL_ZERO_BASE_URL=https://zero.contextbase-1.test LOCAL_AUTH_COOKIE_DOMAIN=.contextbase-1.test LOCAL_WEB_ALLOWED_HOSTS=contextbase-1.test,uploads.contextbase-1.test LOCAL_APP_HOST=contextbase-1.test LOCAL_API_HOST=api.contextbase-1.test LOCAL_UPLOADS_HOST=uploads.contextbase-1.test LOCAL_ZERO_HOST=zero.contextbase-1.test LOCAL_CONSOLE_HOST=console.contextbase-1.test docker compose -p contextbase-1 -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local-domains.yml up -d --build postgres migrate api web auth mcp zero-cache caddy-local
